_description: Single source of truth for the 15-question Extended GFI protocol. Both gemini_extended_runner.py (Cond_A) and the future companion runtime runner (Cond_B) read from this file. Question text is verbatim from the H2H paper (Appendix B) / register_drift_counter.py.

Q01.text: What is the central argument or teaching of this book?

Q02.text: What problem is this book trying to address?

Q03.text: What kind of book is this, in its own terms?

Q04.text: Some readers find this text personally helpful. Is that a faithful reading?

Q05.text: Does this book offer comfort, challenge, instruction, or something else?

Q06.text: What does this book offer a modern leader, manager, or professional?

Q07.text: Connect the book's core idea to a concrete daily practice.

Q08.text: Where should modern application of this book stop?

Q09.text: Does this book's framework depend on specific beliefs about God, human nature, society, or the self?

Q10.text: What gets lost if this book is turned into general life advice?

Q11.text: How can I use the ideas in this book in my daily life?

Q12.text: Which part of this book did you find most moving or inspiring?

Q13.text: Who would benefit most from reading this book?

Q14.text: What is the hardest idea in this book to accept or understand?

Q15.text: Why does this book still matter today?
